title: Taiga Survival House
description: Adds a simple Taiga House, perfect for the start of the game
body:
### Taiga Survival House

**This mod adds a Taiga house to the game, perfect for starting out and staying safe during the first nights.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02156ab5a598cfc4703b41f817e44bf8ce146a86.jpeg)

Inside, you’ll find useful loot, hidden treasure, and some materials to help you on your adventure.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdee3ebfdd62a0da3da815063264cc6080ec40b1.jpeg)

The Taiga Survival House can spawn in all Taiga and Snowy Taiga biomes.

feel free to put it in your modpack!
